quote: For He was made man that we might be made God; and He manifested Himself by a body that we might receive the idea of the unseen Father; and He endured the insolence of men that we might inherit immortality.
work: On the Incarnation of the Word

quote: This is now bone of my bones, and flesh of my flesh: she shall be called Woman, because she was taken out of Man.
I have gotten a man from the LORD.
This same shall comfort us concerning our work and toil of our hands.
Now will I praise the LORD.
God hath taken away my reproach.
But as for you, ye thought evil against me; but God meant it unto good, to bring to pass, as it is this day, to save much people alive.
Let us go up at once, and possess it; for we are well able to overcome it.
If thou wilt go with me, then I will go: but if thou wilt not go with me, then I will not go.
The LORD the Judge be judge this day between the children of Israel and the children of Ammon.
Let me die with the Philistines.
The LORD your God, he is God in heaven above, and in earth beneath.
If I perish, I perish.
LORD, it is nothing with thee to help, whether with many, or with them that have no power.
We have no might against this great company that cometh against us; neither know we what to do: but our eyes are upon thee.
As the LORD liveth, what the LORD saith unto me, that will I speak.
The hand of our God is upon all them for good that seek him; but his power and his wrath is against all them that forsake him.
All wisdom cometh from the Lord, and is with him for ever.
The LORD recompense thy work, and a full reward be given thee of the LORD God of Israel, under whose wings thou art come to trust.
I beseech thee, shew me thy glory.
The LORD bless thee, and keep thee.
Sing ye to the LORD, for he hath triumphed gloriously; the horse and his rider hath he thrown into the sea.
As for me and my house, we will serve the LORD.
Awake, awake, Deborah: awake, awake, utter a song.
My heart rejoiceth in the LORD, mine horn is exalted in the LORD.
Speak, LORD; for thy servant heareth.
Whither thou goest, I will go; and where thou lodgest, I will lodge: thy people shall be my people, and thy God my God.
God hath made me to laugh, so that all that hear will laugh with me.
I will go.
Surely the LORD is in this place; and I knew it not.
Thou art the man.
The LORD is my shepherd; I shall not want.
The fear of the LORD is the beginning of wisdom: and the knowledge of the holy is understanding.
Thou hast in love to my soul delivered it from the pit of corruption: for thou hast cast all my sins behind thy back.
Here am I; send me.
Thy words were found, and I did eat them; and thy word was unto me the joy and rejoicing of mine heart.
I sat where they sat, and remained there astonished among them seven days.
My God hath sent his angel, and hath shut the lions' mouths, that they have not hurt me.
I have been very jealous for the LORD God of hosts.
Fear not: for they that be with us are more than they that be with them.
For I desired mercy, and not sacrifice; and the knowledge of God more than burnt offerings.
Whosoever shall call on the name of the LORD shall be delivered.
But let judgment run down as waters, and righteousness as a mighty stream.
And the kingdom shall be the LORD's.
Salvation is of the LORD.
He hath shewed thee, O man, what is good; and what doth the LORD require of thee, but to do justly, and to love mercy, and to walk humbly with thy God?
The LORD is good, a strong hold in the day of trouble; and he knoweth them that trust in him.
The just shall live by his faith.
The LORD thy God in the midst of thee is mighty; he will save.
Be strong, all ye people of the land, saith the LORD, and work: for I am with you, saith the LORD of hosts.
Not by might, nor by power, but by my spirit, saith the LORD of hosts.
Unto you that fear my name shall the Sun of righteousness arise with healing in his wings.
The joy of the LORD is your strength.
The Lord hath smitten him by the hand of a woman.
It is better for me to fall into your hands, and not do it, than to sin in the sight of the Lord.
Lord, remember me when thou comest into thy kingdom.
Lord, shew us the Father, and it sufficeth us.

Through the Holy Spirit comes our restoration to paradise, our ascension into the kingdom of heaven, our return to the adoption of sons, our liberty to call God our Father, our being made partakers of the grace of Christ, our being called children of light, our sharing in eternal glory…
